# Castle Express Moving & Storage

## About
Castle Express Moving & Storage is a family-owned moving company based in Enfield, Connecticut, serving Hartford County CT and Western Massachusetts since 2008. Founded by Joseph Caronna, the company operates a fleet of trucks from a 10,000 sq ft facility. Licensed (MC-1377498, USDOT 4192498, CT Permit MH-2658), insured, A+ BBB rated, and 4.9-star Google rating with 200+ reviews.

## Contact
- Phone: 1-888-553-4503
- Address: 4 Niblick Rd Unit A, Enfield, CT 06082
- Website: https://castleexpressmoving.com

## Services
- Residential Moving: Houses, apartments, condos, senior relocations. Flat-rate pricing.
- Commercial & Office Moving: Business relocations with minimal downtime.
- Packing Services: Full-service packing, partial packing, and Princess Packing™ white-glove service.
- Climate-Controlled Storage: Short-term and long-term storage in Enfield, CT.
- Specialty Moving: Pianos, safes, fine art, antiques, gun safes.

## Service Areas
Hartford County CT: Enfield, Bloomfield, East Granby, East Windsor, Ellington, Glastonbury, Granby, Hartford, Manchester, Simsbury, Somers, South Windsor, Suffield, Vernon, West Hartford, Windsor, Windsor Locks
Western MA: Agawam, Longmeadow, Springfield, Westfield

## Key Pages
- Home: https://castleexpressmoving.com/

- Service Areas: https://castleexpressmoving.com/service-areas/

- Princess Packing: https://castleexpressmoving.com/princess-packing.html

## Pricing
Castle Express uses flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees. Free estimates available by phone or online form. Princess Packing™ tiers: Pro ($595, 25 boxes), Plus ($995, 50 boxes), Premium ($1,895, 100 boxes).
